mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template_region_annotation ( id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, page_index, rect_json, source_type, editable, section_key, user_instruction, required_evidence_policy, status, annotation_revision ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{templateVersion}, #{fieldId}, #{pageIndex}, #{rectJson}, #{sourceType}, #{editable}, #{sectionKey}, #{userInstruction}, #{requiredEvidencePolicy}, #{status}, #{annotationRevision} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_template_region_annotation SET field_id = #{fieldId}, page_index = #{pageIndex}, rect_json = #{rectJson}, source_type = #{sourceType}, editable = #{editable}, section_key = #{sectionKey}, user_instruction = #{userInstruction}, required_evidence_policy = #{requiredEvidencePolicy}, status = #{status}, annotation_revision = #{annotationRevision}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, page_index, rect_json, source_type, editable, section_key, user_instruction, required_evidence_policy, status, annotation_revision, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_region_annotation WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND template_version = #{templateVersion} ORDER BY page_index ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, page_index, rect_json, source_type, editable, section_key, user_instruction, required_evidence_policy, status, annotation_revision, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_region_annotation WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND template_version = #{templateVersion} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND editable = TRUE AND field_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, page_index, rect_json, source_type, editable, section_key, user_instruction, required_evidence_policy, status, annotation_revision, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_region_annotation WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
